---
name: Eval case
about: Add or report a reproducible repair benchmark case
labels: evals
---

## Repository or fixture

Link the repo, fixture, or describe the seeded defect.

## Failure command

```bash
paste the failing verifier command here
```

## Failure class

Examples: compile error, failing test, lint failure, flaky test.

## Expected repair target

Describe the intended green state.

## Acceptance criteria

List the commands or checks that must pass.

## Artifact or reproduction notes

Include setup steps, fixture paths, and any artifact bundle evidence that makes the case reproducible.
